name: MaxTransfers limit truncates group mint path to empty
description: Same pair as group-mint-multi-hop-collateral-001 but with maxTransfers=6. The group minting path requires ~20 steps. With maxTransfers=6, no feasible path can be found. Tests that maxTransfers correctly prevents paths that are too long.
notes: Returns empty transfers and maxFlow=0. Group mint path needs >6 steps.
